name: Beef Noodle Bake
recipeIngredient: 4 cups (8 oz.) Cooked and drained noodles
1/2 lb Velveeta Pasteurized Process Cheese Spread, cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, brown the meat and drain.
2. Add tomato sauce, chopped onions, and green bell peppers; mix well.
3. Cover and simmer for 5 minutes.
4. Layer cooked noodles, cheese, and meat mixture in a 1 1/2 quart casserole dish.
5. Cover and bake at 350 degrees for 40 minutes.
6. Top with additional cheese and sliced bell pepper, if desired.
7. Makes 4 to 6 servings.
